testModifications.reasoning: No test files were modified by the implementer. Tests were created in commit 31545f1 and remain unchanged. Implementation only modified apps/web/composables/useApi.ts and created apps/web/middleware/auth.ts.

criteria.criterion: composables/useApi.ts imports useAuth and conditionally sets Authorization header on all requests
criteria.details: Line 4 imports useAuth; lines 6-12 define getHeaders() that conditionally sets 'Authorization: Bearer <token>' header; header is applied to all HTTP methods (GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE)
File exists at middleware/auth.ts with proper export default, uses defineNuxtRouteMiddleware, imports and calls useAuth, and uses navigateTo for redirects

criteria.criterion: Unauthenticated request to any protected route redirects to /login
criteria.details: Lines 8-10 check if unauthenticated and attempting protected route (excluding guest-only routes), returns navigateTo('/login'); properly excludes /login itself from redirect loop
Lines 13-15 check if authenticated and accessing guest-only route (/login, /register), returns navigateTo('/'); also covers /register edge case

codeQualityAnalysis.typeSafety: Excellent - proper Record<string, string> typing for headers, no 'any' types
codeQualityAnalysis.reactivity: Correct - proper use of Vue reactivity with auth.token.value and computed properties
codeQualityAnalysis.errorHandling: Good - middleware logic is defensive and clear, no silent failures
codeQualityAnalysis.conventions: Excellent - follows Nuxt middleware patterns, proper export default for Nuxt auto-discovery
codeQualityAnalysis.readability: Excellent - clear variable names, helpful comments, logic is straightforward
codeQualityAnalysis.security: Excellent - Authorization header format is correct, token only sent when present, no sensitive data leakage
codeQualityAnalysis.performance: Good - getHeaders() efficiently creates header object on demand, computed isAuthenticated prevents unnecessary re-evaluation

testCoverage.details: All test suites passing with comprehensive coverage: AC1 verifies useAuth import, AC1b tests all HTTP methods with/without token, AC2 verifies middleware file structure, AC3 tests unauthenticated redirects with edge cases, AC4 tests authenticated redirects including /register edge case

reasoning: All 34 tests pass with zero failures. Implementation correctly addresses all acceptance criteria: (1) useApi.ts properly imports useAuth and injects Authorization header conditionally on all requests, (2) middleware/auth.ts created with proper Nuxt patterns, (3) unauthenticated users redirected to /login except when already there, (4) authenticated users redirected away from guest-only routes. Code quality is excellent with proper type safety, Vue reactivity patterns, security practices, and Nuxt conventions. No test files were modified by the implementer. The implementation is production-ready.
